overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection filled with traffic and bright digital billboards. High-quality game engine footage with cinematic lighting and detailed modern city architecture.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on the building ledge, surveying the city below with occasional slight shifts in posture and head movements

entered.detail: Tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and vertical signage
Building edge where Spider-Man is perched, overlooking the street below
Large prominent red digital billboard displaying STRANGE advertisement with character imagery
Building facade covered with multiple illuminated digital displays and advertisements
Tall glass building with purple advertisement banner visible at street level
Multi-lane avenue with heavy vehicle traffic and pedestrian crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man observes the city from a high-rise concrete ledge, with modern glass skyscrapers flanking both sides. Below, a busy multi-lane intersection filled with dense traffic and scattered pedestrians stretches into the distance, dominated by large vivid digital billboards including a prominent red STRANGE advertisement. The scene remains static with only minor idle movements from the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic perspective from a high-altitude vantage point overlooking a vibrant, neon-lit urban center. It begins with Spider-Man perched on a concrete ledge, framed by the towering glass facades of modern skyscrapers. As the camera lingers, the view expands downward to reveal a sprawling multi-lane intersection teeming with dense traffic and pedestrians. The scene then focuses on the vivid glow of the city's digital landscape, dominated by large billboards including a prominent red STRANGE advertisement that illuminates the street below.
